LanguageData.PS_RoleDirectorDesc: Play from an omniscient point of view, managing the characters.
LanguageData.PS_RoleCharacterDesc: Play from the point of view of one of your characters.
LanguageData.PS_ModeAuthenticDesc: You must stick with the character you choose forever. You may never switch to omniscient view, and are always in your character's shoes. Recommended for narrative experiences.
LanguageData.PS_ModeSwapDesc: You may switch between characters, but must always remain in the perspective of the characters. Recommended for players who like the playstyle but want more control over multiple characters.
LanguageData.PS_ModeDynamicDesc: While your primary form of play will be within your characters, you may swap between director style play or playing as any of your characters at any point.
LanguageData.PS_MustSelectCharacter: You must select a character before continuing.
